name: Foshan Golden Milky Way Intelligent Equipment Co., Ltd.
summary: Foshan Golden Milky Way Intelligent Equipment Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, design, production, and sale of conveying, metering, mixing, dispersing, reaction, filling, packaging, online testing, central control, and other intelligent systems in China. Its products are applied in the fields of organic silicon, polymer compounds, lithium battery slurry, and biochemistry. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Foshan, China.
